name: vscode-codex-switcher
description: Switch Codex accounts and profiles from the status bar, store full auth payloads securely, preserve profile-specific state, and keep usage visible while you work.

commands.title: Codex Account Switcher: Export Active Auth
Codex Account Switcher: Update Profile From Current Auth
Codex Account Switcher: Login With Codex CLI
Codex Account Switcher: Manage Accounts and Profiles
Codex Account Switcher: Show Usage Details

codexAccountSwitcher.codexHome.description: Codex home directory. If empty, uses CODEX_HOME or defaults to ~/.codex. Also used when reading session usage data.

codexAccountSwitcher.storageMode.markdownDescription: Where saved profiles keep their auth payloads. `secretStorage` is preferred locally. `remoteFiles` is useful for shared SSH/remote extension hosts. `auto` chooses `remoteFiles` in SSH remote sessions and `secretStorage` otherwise.

codexAccountSwitcher.accounts.description: Legacy named account snapshots used only for one-time migration to the profile store.

authFile.description: Path to account snapshot auth file. Supports ${codexHome}.

enabled.description: Whether this account can be selected.

codexAccountSwitcher.activeAccount.markdownDescription: Legacy active account name used only for one-time migration to the profile store.

codexAccountSwitcher.confirmBeforeSwitch.description: Ask for confirmation before switching account.

codexAccountSwitcher.ensureFileBasedCred.description: Warn that account swapping requires file-based Codex credentials.

codexAccountSwitcher.reloadTarget.markdownDescription: Reload strategy after switching: `extensionHost` (recommended, less disruptive) or full `window` reload.

codexAccountSwitcher.showUsageInStatusBa.description: Show last-known 5h and weekly usage in the status bar for the active account/profile.

codexAccountSwitcher.showUsageInSwitcher.description: Show last-known 5h and weekly usage in the account switch picker.

codexAccountSwitcher.usagePercentDisplay.description: Whether percentages show remaining allowance or used percentage in the status bar, picker, tooltip, and usage details panel.

codexAccountSwitcher.usageColorsEnabled.description: Enable colored usage indicators based on 5h/weekly usage percentage.

codexAccountSwitcher.usageWarningThresho.description: Usage percentage threshold where warning coloring starts.

codexAccountSwitcher.usageWarningColor.description: Color used for warning-level usage indicators.

codexAccountSwitcher.usageCriticalThresh.description: Usage percentage threshold where critical coloring starts.

codexAccountSwitcher.usageCriticalColor.description: Color used for critical-level usage indicators.

codexAccountSwitcher.usageRefreshInterva.description: How often to refresh rate-limit usage from Codex session files while VS Code is open.

codexAccountSwitcher.statusBarSide.markdownDescription: Status bar side for the account switcher item.

scripts.test:unit: npm run compile && node --test out/test/core.test.js out/test/usage.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
